[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010010 2
1 0000000 a
2 0010100 2
3 0000010 1
4 0010010 2
5 0000000 a
6 0010100 2
7 0000010 1

01 10 0100010 2
12 21 0000011 2
23 32 0001011 3
34 43 0001000 1
45 54 0000000 a match 1 5

67 76 0000000 a match 1 5
70 07 1000100 2

13 31 0000011 2

35 53 0000010 1 match 3 7
46 64 0010000 1
57 75 0000000 a match 1 5

71 17 0000000 a match 1 5

14 41 0000000 a match 1 5
25 52 0000010 1 match 3 7

61 16 0000010 1 match 3 7
72 27 1000100 2

37 73 0000000 a match 1 5
